commit.message:
Resolve human-readable species names from SBML annotations and replace RoadRunner fallback with COPASI retry cascade

Extract UniProt/KEGG identifiers from SBML annotation blocks and resolve them
to proper protein/compound names via REST APIs. Clean up BioNetGen-style state
annotations and x##_ prefixes for models without annotations. Show database IDs
in hover tooltips. Replace the RoadRunner NaN fallback with a COPASI-native
retry strategy: more internal steps → RADAU5 stiff solver → looser tolerances.

commit.message:
fix: Upgrade onnxruntime-gpu to >=1.19 for cuDNN 9 support (#229)

onnxruntime-gpu 1.17.1 requires cuDNN 8, but VastAI/RunPod containers
now ship cuDNN 9. Symlink hacks can't bridge this ABI gap. Upgrading
to >=1.19.0 which natively supports CUDA 12 + cuDNN 9 from standard
PyPI — no Microsoft extra-index-url needed.

- requirements_base.txt / requirements.txt: onnxruntime-gpu >=1.19.0
- installer.py: restore verify_onnx_runtime() post-install check
- vastai_setup.sh / provision_runpod.sh: simplify fallback upgrade

commit.message:
fix: Singer-first rule — 60-70% singer shots with lip sync

The videos looked bad because the pipeline was distributing shots equally
across 9 angles. Fixed:
1. Singer must appear in 60-70% of shots when vocals are present
2. Singer prompt MUST include "mouth open singing, lip sync, close-up face"
3. Only cut to instruments/crowd during clear instrumental breaks
4. Pattern: singer(4s) → cutaway(2s) → singer(4s) → cutaway(2s)

Also updated analyze_audio.ts Gemini prompt with same rules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: filter Whisper hallucinations from transcription results

Whisper generates phantom phrases like 'ご清聴ありがとうございました'
from silence/noise. Added a hallucination filter that blocks known
phantom phrases in both interim and final transcriptions.

commit.message:
revert: remove styles.xml/sheetFormatPr restoration that corrupted Excel files

Reverts to 5e236ab (the working version). The xl/styles.xml and
sheetFormatPr wholesale restoration broke Excel file layouts because
ExcelJS reassigns style indices when adding images/cells, and
replacing styles.xml with the original caused index mismatches.

Column width preservation via <cols> XML restoration remains intact.

commit.message:
chore: Update parity matrix and close resolved beads (batch 4) (#981)

- Update UI_SCREENS_MAPPING.md to reflect resolved feature gaps
- Mark Add Device Type icon picker as resolved (PR #978)
- Mark AI Chat as design decision (platform-appropriate patterns)
- Close beads: bb-ke1y, bb-aczg, bb-rrs4.3, bb-423z, bb-rrs4 (epic)

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: enable real SSR — remove AuthProvider render-blocking + add Suspense boundaries

Root cause: AuthProvider returned null during SSR because isHydrated
(set via useEffect) is always false on the server. This caused the
entire page tree to render as empty HTML — only 'Skip to content'
was visible to crawlers and search engines.

Fix:
- Remove 'if (!isHydrated) return null' guard in AuthProvider
- Add Suspense boundaries around components using useSearchParams()
- Extract client pages (login, waitlist, accept-invite, checkout) into
  separate Client files with Server Component wrappers for Suspense

Verified: built HTML now contains 3,241+ chars of real page content
including nav, footer, and full page body.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(25): move cloud approval resolve callback outside SolidJS store

SolidJS stores wrap values in proxies for reactivity, which can break
function references. The pendingCloudRequestResolve callback stored in
the store was silently failing when called — the approval modal would
collapse but the promise never resolved, so the cloud request never sent.

Fix: store the resolve function in a plain module-level variable and
expose resolvePendingCloudRequest() helper for Shell.tsx to call.

commit.message:
Standardise license setup: MPL-2.0 + PMPL-1.0-or-later (REUSE)

- LICENSE: pure MPL-2.0 text for machine detection (GitHub, registries)
- LICENSES/MPL-2.0.txt: standard MPL-2.0 text
- LICENSES/PMPL-1.0-or-later.txt: Palimpsest License text
- NOTICE: explains the dual-license relationship
- Source SPDX headers remain PMPL-1.0-or-later

This ensures OSI compliance checks pass while preserving PMPL as
the governing license for source code.

Split projection horizon into Investment + Operating phases

  🏗️  Investment Phase — pre-revenue construction / ramp-up period
  📈  Operating Phase  — revenue-generating operations
A live "Total" badge updates as either value changes.

Model changes:
- revenues.py: revenue = 0 for every investment-phase year; operating
  phase starts at base_revenue in Op Year 1 and grows from there
- dcf_model.py: period = investment_years + operating_years; both
  values are carried through in the results dict

Visual changes:
- tables.py: investment columns labelled "Inv N" with orange headers
  and amber cell tint; operating columns labelled "Op N" in green
- charts.py: phase-aware x-axis labels (Base / Inv N / Op N);
  investment bars coloured orange in the revenue chart

Sphere defaults updated with per-sector investment horizons:
  Production 1+5, Toll Road 3+12, Agriculture 2+10,
  Mining 3+12, Port 4+16

commit.message:
fix: Two critical Remotion fixes for smooth music video output

1. All-keyframe encode: re-encode merged.mp4 with -g 1 -keyint_min 1
   before passing to Remotion. Remotion seeks frame-by-frame — without
   all keyframes it produces choppy/stuttering output.

2. Lyrics word filter: filter transcript to only words at/after
   CHORUS_START before parseElevenLabsTranscript. Without this,
   pre-chorus words get clamped to t=0 and all appear at frame 0.

Both bugs confirmed and fixed via testing on espresso-sabrina.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: preserve xl/styles.xml and sheetFormatPr to prevent display width drift

Column widths like 2.8 were showing as 2.83 in Excel because ExcelJS/
xlsx-populate modified xl/styles.xml (font definitions) and sheetFormatPr
(defaultColWidth, dyDescent), which affects how Excel calculates the
display width from the same XML width value.

Now preserves three layers of formatting:
1. <cols> XML (column width values) — already implemented
2. <sheetFormatPr> (defaultColWidth, defaultRowHeight, dyDescent)
3. xl/styles.xml (complete font/style definitions)

All three are captured on load and restored byte-for-byte on save,
for both encrypted and non-encrypted paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(renderer): add touch support, responsive layout, and input handling

Implement MouseHandler with click/drag/double-click detection and DOM
event attachment. TouchHandler maps single touch to mouse events, detects
pinch-to-zoom with scale computation, and long-press for context menus.
KeyboardHandler tracks modifier keys and supports registerable keyboard
shortcuts. ResponsiveLayout computes integer-scaled nearest-neighbor
upscaling from 512x342 logical resolution to viewport, detects mobile
breakpoints for tool palette drawer mode, and uses ResizeObserver for
dynamic re-layout. All input handlers convert screen coordinates to
logical canvas coordinates.

commit.message:
feat(renderer): add tool palette with paint tools and Tool interface

Implement all 17 HyperCard tools: Browse, Button, Field, Select, Lasso,
Pencil, Brush, Eraser, Line, Spray, Rectangle, Round Rectangle, Bucket,
Oval, Curve, Regular Polygon, Text. Each implements the extensible Tool
interface with mouseDown/mouseMove/mouseUp handlers. Paint tools modify
card pixel data using Bresenham's line, midpoint ellipse/circle, scanline
flood fill, and Catmull-Rom spline algorithms. ToolPalette is a floating
2-column icon grid with classic HyperCard layout and tool selection.

commit.message:
Add domain readiness profiles, semantic returns, selective evidence

- Readiness profiles: per-domain CSS selectors replace generic networkidle
  waits (LinkedIn, Gmail, Google, GitHub, Yelp, Facebook, Instagram).
  Falls back to networkidle only for unknown domains in non-FAST_MODE.
- Semantic return contracts: navigate/click now return readyState,
  readiness match info, navigationOccurred — reducing LLM round trips.
- Selective evidence mode (EVIDENCE_MODE=selective): records on errors,
  approval gates, and first/last steps only. Replaces binary all/none.

commit.message:
feat(engine): add WASM FFI bridge exposing WildCardEngine to JavaScript

Adds the WildCardEngine struct with wasm_bindgen bindings:
- new() — creates a new engine instance
- version() — returns engine version
- load_script(source) — compiles WildTalk handlers, returns "ok" or error
- send_message(name) — dispatches a message and returns JSON events array
- execute_line(line) — runs a single line (message box), returns result
- load_stack(json) — loads a stack from JSON, extracts scripts and fields
- get_state() — returns current runtime state as JSON

All methods serialize/deserialize across the WASM boundary using strings
and JSON. The engine is fully headless — it emits structured events
(GoToCard, SetField, ShowMessage, PlaySound, SetProperty, ShowObject,
HideObject, WaitSeconds, FetchUrl) that the renderer consumes.

Includes 14 integration tests covering the full WASM API surface.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(ios): Add icon picker, battery quantity, and AI suggestion to Add Device Type (#978)

Enrich the iOS Add Device Type screen to match the Compose implementation:

- Icon picker grid: 4-column LazyVGrid with SF Symbol icons, selection
  highlighting with primary color circle, sorted with used icons first
- Battery quantity controls: HStack with minus/plus buttons and integer
  display (min 1), wired to the ViewModel wrapper state
- AI icon suggestion: ViewModel wrapper subscribes to suggestedIcon from
  KMP uiState, auto-selects suggested icon in grid, shows spinner on
  name field while suggesting
- ViewModelWrapper updates: Expose selectedIcon, batteryQuantity,
  isSuggestingIcon, suggestedIcon, and usedIcons from KMP ViewModel
- SFSymbolMapper: Add availableIcons list and displayName helper
- Localization: Add new string keys for icon section, field labels,
  and battery quantity controls
- Snapshot tests: Updated to match new ContentView signature

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
